name: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk
summary: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated energy provider in Indonesia. It is involved in the distribution and storage of natural gas and fuel; operation and maintenance of gas facilities; gas transmission and compression activities; and electricity generation and supply activities. The company also offers supporting services for oil and natural gas mining; consultations on mining; port management, loading-unloading containers; leasing and management of building; supporting facilities of property companies; and development planning and supervision consultation services. In addition, it is involved in the development, management, and operation of gas infrastructure; gas transmission pipeline capacity trading; and building construction and trading. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.
